title: Inside The Twizy Electric Car Battery
description:
Despite what i said in the video we were asked to put a donate link up so if you want to help you can donate here https://secure.workingink.co.uk/product-category/donations/
The github resource I am using can be found here https://github.com/dexterbg/Twizy-Virtual-BMS I am basically replicating Blazej's lead acid Twizy modification. The royalty free music was supplied by bensound from www.bensound.com
